creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
This was intentional as there were some ports that worked all the way up
to 4.8 but not with 5.X, so I broke the "41+ implies 5.1" at that time.
 There's a DB cleanup pending anyways (to be discussed whether before or
after 9-release) which should then fix similar issues.

Note that db 5.2 was packaged as databases/db5, and db51 got removed.
